author: Marc-Danie Nazaire, Thorin Tabor
plan:
## HierarchicalClusteringViewer GenePattern Module — Implementation Plan

### 1. Overview
HierarchicalClusteringViewer is a GenePattern module that Views results of hierarchical clustering.

### 2. Parameters
The module exposes 3 parameters:
- Required: cdt.file
- Optional: gtr.file, atr.file

### 3. Command Line
```
hclViewer.html ? <cdt.file> <gtr.file> <atr.file>
```

### 4. Docker Image
Docker image: 

### 5. Validation Strategy
- Validate all required parameters are provided
- Validate file formats match expected extensions
- Check parameter value ranges where applicable

### 6. Implementation Roadmap
Phase 1: Wrapper script implementation
Phase 2: Docker container setup
Phase 3: Parameter validation and error handling
Phase 4: Testing and documentation

parameters.name: cdt.file
parameters.description: Clustered data table, contains the original data, but reordered

parameters.name: gtr.file
parameters.description: Gene tree file, records the order in which genes (rows) were joined (at least one of gtr file and atr file is required)

parameters.name: atr.file
parameters.description: Array tree file, records the order in which samples (columns) were joined (at least one of gtr file and atr file is required)
